name: essentiallysports-golf-hub
description: EssentiallySports golf social hub with live feed parsing, source enrichment, and static fallbacks.

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check assets/js/social-feed.js && node --check assets/js/score-ticker.js && node -e "for (const f of ['data/sport-feed.json','data/sport-feed-youtube.json','data/score-ticker.json']) JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(f,'utf8')); console.log('checks passed')"
